subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #034 Peter and the Papacy
subcodes.first_line: This utterance of Christ is an affirmation of Peter's reply, when Christ asked: “Whom do ye believe me to be?”
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بیان مسیح تصدیق قول پطرس است در وقتی که گفت چه اعتقاد بمن داری
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @priestcraft, @Christian doctrine and practice, @high station of learning, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @religion as source; stimulus of knowledge and science, @the Christian clergy
